prestazioni: BMW S54B32 engine (3.2L inline-6) upgraded with a custom-forged internals kit from Mahle Motorsport, including forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft with balanced rotating assembly for 9,000 RPM reliability

Turbocharged conversion using a Garrett GT3582R ball-bearing turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Remus, featuring 200-cell catalytic converters and a secondary bypass valve for anti-lag

Standalone ECU from Motec M150 with custom calibration for E85 flex-fuel capability, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 1,200cc high-flow port injectors and a custom fuel system featuring a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump and dual AN-8 feed lines
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Wiesmann MF3-specific Rocket Bunny V3 kit, including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-scanned for OEM-fitment)

Custom 3-piece forged aluminum wheels by BBS (9.5x19 ET20 front, 11x19 ET25 rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) for track-focused grip

Full interior reupholstery in Alcantara with custom stitching by Recaro, featuring SPG XL seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harness compatibility) and a custom roll cage by Matter Fab with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
